metadata.name: Report a Suspicious Person on Campus

description: A student calls campus safety to report a suspicious individual near the library.

nodes.task_description: Gather critical information from the caller: location, description of the person, and their behavior.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calmly collects all relevant details.

nodes.task_description: Create a new incident report in the security dispatch system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the report with all collected information.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a campus safety officer to the location to investigate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches the nearest officer and provides them with the incident details.
